profile.name: DEMIS RINCON
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.bio: Crafting digital experiences where ancient elegance meets modern performance. My approach to software engineering is rooted in the philosophy of the 'Ethereal Archive'—building interfaces that feel timeless, immersive, and functional. With every project, I aim to weave a narrative through code, ensuring that the technology never overshadows the story.
profile.quote: Innovation is the bridge between what was lost and what is yet to be discovered.

education.institution: Pontificia Universidad Católica Madre y Maestra

chronicle.description: Leading the development of mission-critical travel commerce micro-frontends. Architecting scalable React components and optimizing performance for global distribution systems.
Engineered B2B commerce solutions and internal logistics applications. Focused on React/Node.js integration and cross-platform mobile development.
Developed web and mobile applications for various clients. Specialized in Flutter for cross-platform mobile and React for high-performance web.
Modernizing legacy systems and implementing cloud-based architectures. Full-stack development with a focus on enterprise scalability.

relics.title: Celebrity Cruises App
relics.description: Modern cross-platform mobile experience for one of the world's premier cruise lines, featuring real-time booking and guest interactions.

relics.title: COOP By Ryder
relics.description: Leading commercial vehicle sharing platform. Architected the frontend for seamless truck rental and fleet management operations.

relics.title: Smart Point Cloud
relics.description: Autonomous 3D mapping interface for complex architectural archives using PointCloud data and WebGL.

relics.title: Hydra Marketplace
relics.description: A high-performance TCG marketplace optimized for speed and cellular connectivity.

relics.title: Neural Engine
relics.description: Interactive dashboard for monitoring real-time generative data streams and AI performance metadata.
